description: Root configuration for Gavel. Place .gavel.yaml (or .gavel.yml) in ~/, the git root, or the target directory; layers merge in that order with later layers overriding earlier ones. Run `gavel config [path]` to inspect the merged result.

allow.description: Paths allowed through even when a broader commit.gitignore glob matches. Useful for generated artifacts you intentionally commit. Appended and deduped across layers.

compatibility.description: Gate for the AI warning that surfaces removed functionality and backward-compatibility issues.

mode.description: Gate behavior. Use false as an alias for skip.

gitignore.description: Extra ignore globs applied when selecting files to commit. Appended and deduped across layers.

hooks.description: Hooks run during `gavel commit` before the final commit is written. Appended across layers in declaration order.

files.description: Glob patterns; the hook runs only when staged files match one of them. Runs unconditionally when omitted.

linkedDeps.description: Deprecated: superseded by commit.precommit. Retained for backward-compatible loading; prefer commit.precommit.mode in new config.

mode.description: Gate behavior. Use false as an alias for skip.

lint.description: Gates that run linters over the staged file set before the commit is created. CLI flags --lint and --lint-secrets override these per invocation.

enabled.description: Toggle every non-secrets linter. Omit to keep off.

secrets.description: Toggle the betterleaks/secrets linter. Omit to keep on (the highest-value pre-commit check).

model.description: AI CLI / model used for commit-message generation and compatibility analysis. Last-write-wins across layers.

precommit.description: Gate for commit.gitignore prompts and linked-dependency checks (package.json file:/link: refs and go.mod replace directives pointing outside the repo).

mode.description: Gate behavior. Use false as an alias for skip.

tidy.description: Controls whether `gavel commit` runs `go mod tidy` in every Go module and stages the resulting go.mod/go.sum changes. CLI flag --tidy overrides per invocation.

enabled.description: Toggle the tidy step. Omit to keep on.
Auto-discover fixture files when running `gavel test`. Sticky: once true in any layer it stays true.

files.description: Globs used to discover fixtures. Replaces (does not append to) the parent layer.

ignore.description: Rules that suppress matching lint violations. Each rule matches when every populated field matches; an empty rule never matches. Appended across layers.

items.description: A single lint-ignore rule. At least one of rule/source/file must be set.

file.description: Match the violation's file path using doublestar globs (e.g. "pkg/**/*.go").

rule.description: Match the violation's rule ID. Accepts literals, `*` globs ("acme-*"), and `!`-prefixed negations.

source.description: Match the emitting linter (e.g. golangci-lint, eslint, betterleaks). Accepts literals, `*` globs, and `!`-prefixed negations.

enabled.description: Force the linter on (true) or off (false). Omit to keep the linter's built-in default.

linters.description: Per-linter overrides keyed by linter name. Useful for opt-in linters like jscpd or disabling a single tool.

post.description: Top-level hooks run after the main pipeline as non-blocking cleanup/reporting. Appended across layers.

name.description: Optional display name for the step.

pre.description: Top-level hooks run before the main test/lint pipeline, in declaration order. Appended across layers.

name.description: Optional display name for the step.

procfile.description: Global defaults for `gavel proc`. Per-process settings live in the Procfile, whose entries are either `name: command` or `name:` with command/default/autoRestart/cpu/mem/profiles/env/maxRestarts. This section holds only defaults + the active profile.

autoRestart.description: Default restart policy for every process. Accepts a bool (true=on-failure, false=no) or an enum: no (never restart), on-failure (restart only on a non-zero exit), or always (restart on any exit).

cpu.description: Default sustained CPU cap per process, as a percentage (100 = one full core). 0 disables it. A process that stays above it is killed.

env.description: Environment injected into every process, on top of the parent environment and any sibling .env file. Merged key-by-key across layers.

maxRestarts.description: Cap on automatic restarts per process. 0 means unlimited.

mem.description: Default resident-memory cap per process (e.g. "512Mi", "2g"). Empty disables it. A process whose group exceeds it is killed.

path.description: Override Procfile discovery. Relative paths resolve against the .gavel.yaml directory. If omitted, the nearest Procfile up to the git root is used.

profile.description: Default active profile. A Procfile entry with `profiles` auto-starts only when one of them is the active profile; `gavel proc --profile <name>` overrides this.

secrets.description: betterleaks / gitleaks secret-scanning orchestration. Rule authoring lives in the TOML files themselves; Gavel only discovers and merges them.

configs.description: Additional .betterleaks.toml / .gitleaks.toml paths to merge in, beyond those discovered in the home dir, git root, and cwd. Relative paths resolve against the .gavel.yaml directory. Appended and deduped across layers.

disabled.description: Disable the betterleaks linter even when the binary is on PATH. Sticky: once true in any layer it stays true.

cmd.description: Command executed by the SSH post-receive hook. Last-write-wins; an empty override inherits the parent value.

verify.description: Settings for `gavel verify`, the AI code-review engine.

checks.description: Selectively disable checks emitted by the verify engine.

disabled.description: Individual check IDs to disable (e.g. SEC-1, PERF-2). Appended across layers.

disabledCategories.description: Whole check categories to disable. Known categories: completeness, code-quality, testing, consistency, security, performance. Appended across layers.

model.description: AI CLI / model used for review. Common values: claude, gemini, codex, or a fully qualified model name. Last-write-wins across layers.

prompt.description: Optional repo-specific review policy appended to Gavel's built-in verify prompt. Last-write-wins across layers.

title: Gavel configuration (.gavel.yaml)
